title: Carts of Minecraft - Immersive Railroading
body:
Carts of Minecraft requires Immersive Railroading to properly operate

Carts of Minecraft

Carts of Minecraft aims to bring Vanilla style carts and tracks to Immersive Railroading's Minecraft gauge in a way that preserves the style and feel of base game carts.

CONTENTS

- Furnace Cart with Passenger Cart for operator - Passenger Cart - Loaded Cart - Chest Cart - Flat Cart - Barrel Cart (Holds Fluid) - Basic Rail - Powered Rail (Prevents wheel slip on Furnace Cart) Curseforge Discord Patreon Iron Horse Dev Group
